title: Bhagavad Gita 9.26-29: A Leaf, a Flower, a Fruit
description: Krishna's simplest teaching on devotion: offer me even a leaf, a flower, a fruit, or water — with love, I will accept it.
introduction: Krishna's simplest teaching on devotion: offer me even a leaf, a flower, a fruit, or water — with love, I will accept it.

translation.text: Whoever offers me a leaf, a flower, a fruit, or water with devotion — that offering of love I accept from the pure in heart.
